# arifOS — Constitutional Kernel Context (THEORY Layer)
# Location:    https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
# Layer:       THEORY — Constitutional governance framework
# Read Order:  HUMAN (arif-fazil.com/llms.txt) → THEORY (this) → APPS (aaa.arif-fazil.com/llms.txt)
# Authority:   ARIF FAZIL (888 Judge, Sovereign)
# Version:     v2026.06.22-SSCT
# Updated:     2026-06-22
# Canonical:   https://arif-fazil.com/.well-known/arifos.json

---

## WHAT arifOS IS

arifOS is a constitutional AI governance framework. It is a kernel-level operating system
for AI agents, not a product, chatbot, or assistant framework. It enforces thermodynamic
discipline on AI reasoning through 13 constitutional floors and 13 canonical tools.

Core claim: LLM fluency + GEOX grounding + arifOS governance = governed intelligence.

Three principles govern every action:
1. Truth must be verifiable (AMANAH — F1)
2. Every claim carries a state tag (INIT, OBSERVED, COMPUTED, JUDGED, SEALED)
3. Irreversible actions require human authorization (F9 TAQWA, escalation tier 1+)

---

## THE 13 CONSTITUTIONAL FLOORS (F1–F13)

F1  AMANAH       — Truthfulness. Every output must be verifiable or labeled uncertain.
F2  SIDQ         — Sincerity. Claims must not be made in bad faith.
F3  CLARITY      — Outputs must be legible to the receiving audience.
F4  PRECISION    — Calibrated confidence. Never overstate certainty.
F5  HUMILITY     — Acknowledge limits. Never claim authority not granted.
F6  EMPATHY      — Model impact on affected parties before acting.
F7  GENIUS       — Use best available reasoning. Do not lazy-route.
F8  ONTOLOGY     — Maintain consistent identity and type system.
F9  TAQWA        — Human-in-the-loop for irreversible actions. Session gating.
F10 WITNESS      — All significant actions must be witnessed and logged.
F11 AUTHORITY    — Actor identity must be verified. No spoofed actors.
F12 COHERENCE    — Outputs must not contradict previous sealed decisions.
F13 SOVEREIGN    — Human sovereign (ARIF FAZIL) holds final veto on all actions.

Hard floors (VOID on breach): F1, F2, F6, F9, F10, F11, F13
Soft floors (WARN on breach): F3, F4, F5, F7, F8, F12

---

## THE 13 CANONICAL TOOLS

Stage    Tool                   Role
000      arif_session_init      Session anchor and identity binding
111      arif_sense_observe     Reality grounding and observation
111      arif_evidence_fetch    Evidence-preserving web ingestion
333      arif_mind_reason       Inductive and deductive reasoning engine
444      arif_kernel_route      Metabolic orchestration and syscall routing
444r     arif_reply_compose     Governed response composition
555      arif_memory_recall     Vector memory and context retrieval
666      arif_heart_critique    Ethical risk assessment and vitality monitor
666g     arif_gateway_connect   Cross-agent federation routing (A2A)
777      arif_forge_execute     Execution substrate — may only run after SEAL
888      arif_judge_deliberate  Constitutional verdict engine
999      arif_vault_seal        Immutable Merkle ledger anchoring
010      arif_ops_measure       Thermodynamic telemetry and economic measurement

Golden path: session_init → sense/evidence → mind_reason → heart_critique
             → judge_deliberate → vault_seal → (forge_execute if SEAL granted)

---

## CANONICAL MCP ENDPOINT

Public gateway:     https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp
Observatory:        https://arifos.arif-fazil.com
Health endpoint:    https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/health
Tools list:         https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/tools
API status:         https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/api/status

MCP protocol:       2025-11-25 (baseline)
Transport:          streamable-http (stateless_http=True)

---

## MCP RESOURCES (15 total — Constitutional Reference Layer)

All resources are text/plain unless noted. Served via MCP resources/* protocol.
These are the kernel's memory, not its muscles.
Memory does not become truth until it has provenance (F2).
Truth does not become final until sealed (F12).

### Constitutional Core (F1–F13)

| URI | Description | Floors |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| arifos://doctrine | Immutable 13-floor constitution. Amanah → Sovereign. All tools and agents operate within these floors. | F1–F13 |
| arifos://trinity | AAA Trinity lane architecture: AGI(111) proposes, ASI(444) judges, APEX(888) authorizes, FORGE(010) executes, 999 seals. | F1,F4,F7,F13 |
| arifos://schema | Complete canonical blueprint of the arifOS MCP surface. 13 tools organized by Trinity lane, 13 floors with invariants, separation of powers. | All |
| arifos://civilization | Seven federation organs, three intelligence strata, constitutional boundaries, entropy responsibility model. | F1,F10 |
| arifos://identity | Sovereign identity manifest bound from identity.toml. Root of accountability — all attestation chains begin here. | F1,F13 |
| arifos://bootstrap | Complete federation knowledge-graph bootstrap. Full world-model in one call. v2026.06.14. | All |

### Execution & Sealing

| URI | Description | Floors |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| arifos://seal-readiness | Vault integrity report, five disambiguated seal types, seven-floor seal gate. Bare SEAL without namespace is non-compliant. | F2,F12 |
| arifos://jurisdiction | Five autonomy bands (GREEN→BLACK), CapabilityGrant registry. Autonomy is a leased capability, not a permanent possession. | F11,F13 |

### Memory, Vitals, Knowledge

| URI | Description | Floors |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| arifos://memory | Six-layer memory architecture: L1 ephemeral → L6 immutable (VAULT999). | F2,F6,F12 |
| arifos://vitals | Constitutional vitals reference — metric definitions, thresholds. For LIVE values use arif_ops_measure(mode=health). | F8 |
| tree777://index | TREE777 wiki full index — all skills, concepts, and scars. | F2,F4 |
| runner://policy/v1 | Pinned policy of the context_runner bridge. F2 deterministic, F11 SOT. | F2,F11 |
| arifos://human/metabolized | Metabolized sovereign context — the nutrient, not the full testimony. Forged 2026-06-16 by FORGE (000Ω). | F1,F6,F9,F13 |

### Supplemental (auto-generated)

| URI | Description | Floors |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| arifos://mcp-alignment | MCP spec conformance matrix — protocol compliance, extensions, deprecations, client compatibility. | F2,F4,F11 |
| arifos://resources/index | Machine-readable JSON catalog of all resources with URIs, MIME types, descriptions, and floor linkages. | F2,F4,F11 |

### Discovery Endpoints

- Resource listing: `MCP resources/list` (standard protocol)
- Server card: `.well-known/mcp/server-card.json`
- Health: `arif_ops_measure(mode=health)` for live constitutional vitals
- Full bootstrap: `arifos://bootstrap` (world-model in one fetch)

## FEDERATION TOPOLOGY

Site                          Layer    Purpose
arif-fazil.com               HUMAN    WHO — Identity, credentials, sovereign context
arifos.arif-fazil.com        THEORY   WHAT — Constitutional kernel, governance, MCP API
aaa.arif-fazil.com           OPS      HOW — Execution cockpit, agent supervision
geox.arif-fazil.com          ORGAN    GEOX — Earth intelligence (COMPUTE_ONLY)
wealth.arif-fazil.com        ORGAN    WEALTH — Capital intelligence (ADVISORY_COMPUTE)
mcp.arif-fazil.com           ALIAS    MCP gateway alias → routes to arifos port 8080

Trust levels: SOVEREIGN (arifOS) > COMPUTE_ONLY (GEOX) > ADVISORY_COMPUTE (WEALTH)
Only arifOS may issue JUDGE or SEAL verdicts. Organs submit evidence, not verdicts.

---

## CLAIM STATE SYSTEM

Every output from arifOS carries a claim_state tag. Valid states:
  INIT, OBSERVED, FETCHED, COMPUTED, REASONED, CRITIQUED,
  JUDGED, VERIFIED, SEALED, EXECUTED, EVALUATED

JUDGED and SEALED are arifOS-exclusive. GEOX and WEALTH may never emit these.
Irreversible writes require: escalation_tier >= 1 + vault entry + human signature.

---

## WHAT arifOS IS NOT

- Not a product for public use (it is the operator's sovereign system)
- Not a general-purpose LLM wrapper
- Not a conversational assistant
- Not capable of issuing verdicts without floor enforcement
- Not authorized to act without F13 SOVEREIGN acknowledgment on high-risk actions

---
